title: Cortella
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Youmay|the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]|the [[Cortella (Jedi)|individual]]}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Cortella |region=[[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Cortella system/Legends|Cortella system]] |sector= |system=[[Cortella system/Legends|Cortella system]] |coordinates=K-9 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government=[[Monarchy/Legends|Monarchy]]''[[Jedi Quest: The School of Fear]]'' |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Thank you for seeing us on such short notice.''"
"''The king and queen of Cortella are always welcome.|Obi-Wan Kenobi and the president of the Leadership School|}} '''Cortella''' was a [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] ruled by a [[Monarchy/Legends|monarchy]]. In [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]], the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]] impersonated the [[King/Legends|king]] and [[Queen/Legends|queen]] of Cortella in order to [[Mission to Andara|infiltrate]] the elite [[Leadership School]] on the planet [[Andara/Legends|Andara]]. During a meeting with the school's [[Unidentified Leadership School president|president]], in which they negotiated a permission to carry out a tour of the establishment, the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] pretended to be interested in sending their [[Gender/Legends|son]] to attend the school. ==Description== Cortella was a little-known [[Planet/Legends|planet]]{{CSWECite|I|145|Cortella}} located in the [[Cortella system/Legends|Cortella system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. ==History== {{Quote|If you ever get tired of being a Jedi, you'd make an amazing queen.''"
"''And you'd make a terrible king. Royal regal sons?''"
"''I was trying to sound pompous.|Obi-Wan Kenobi and Siri Tachi|}} [[File:TachiOlinKenobi-TheSchoolOfFearJapanese.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Siri Tachi (left) and Obi-Wan Kenobi (right) impersonated the queen and king of Cortella while infiltrating the Leadership School on Andara.]] Cortella was ruled by a [[Monarchy/Legends|monarchy]]. In [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' while [[Mission to Andara|investigating]] the elite [[Leadership School]] on the Core Worlds''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Andaran system]] planet [[Andara/Legends|Andara]], the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]] realized they needed a suitable cover for infiltrating the establishment. To that end, Kenobi came up with a plan for them to impersonate the [[King/Legends|king]] and [[Queen/Legends|queen]] of Cortella in order to be able to go on a tour of the school. After contacting within [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]] Kenobi's acquaintance, the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Senatorial aide]] [[Tyro Caladian]], to help rapidly procure false identity documents, the two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] met with the [[Unidentified Leadership School president|president]] of the Leadership School, having contacted him under the pretense of considering the school for their supposed [[Gender/Legends|son]], a [[Prince/Legends|prince]]. During the meeting, the Jedi wore traveler's [[Clothing/Legends|tunics]], which the pair rationalized as being intentionally inconspicuous. Tachi had not changed her appearance significantly, having only slicked her [[Hair/Legends|hair]] back more, and Kenobi attempted to affect a pompous manner of speech. During the conversation with the [[President/Legends|president]]—who considered the interest by the monarchs of Cortella an honor—the Jedi claimed they were alternatively considering a school on the Core Worlds planet''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] and eventually negotiated a permission to carry out an unguided tour of the Leadership School. ==Behind the scenes== Cortella was first mentioned in [[Jedi Quest: The School of Fear|''The School of Fear'']], [[Jude Watson]]'s [[2003]] fifth installment of the ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Quest]]'' young-reader novel series. The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Cortella [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square K-9. ==Appearances== {{Indexpage}} *''[[Jedi Quest: The School of Fear]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Cortella }} [[Category:Planets in the Core Worlds]]
